title: A Way Out feat. Phloeasy
lyrics: I know you tried to understand different lights at night I know you tried, but thoughts start breaking out in front of you I feel it too The devices crash to the pavement Which way is home? What did it all mean? We can fight it If you stay We can build it If you dream you're awake Light in the dark away We can build it here Don't stop what you do Don't stop hearing me Don't stop saying what you feel Inside yourself completely We can find a way We can find a way out of here I see different stars at noon too I know they're my past and the people that came before I know what you want to say is true When you're looking up here I hope the view is clear You don't care No clearly Yet it's here for now I need you up above But you're too far away I don't know if this can get funny Or is our past clear? Every time you keep on achieving your dreams I'm not your second option I'm not your feed I'm not the thing that you better be dreaming on I'm the trolls I scream at you Hold with my hand now Let's find a way out of all of that Let's find a way through Let's make you Falling free Falling free You and me Falling free From the boundaries of our lives Of our own hearts Skeletons we hid From the fucking heart I'll give you it all And you'll just start to Come on, come on You think you've got yourself inside of you You're not young, you're not stupid You're not weak Rise above your own self Hate and find love for you Find love for you You and I, that shit, did it just a minute If you did it, just fucking admit it Can I tell you, if you did it, just admit it And we can all get together and be okay

lyricsSegments.text: I know you tried to understand different lights at night I know you tried, but thoughts start
breaking out in front of you
The devices crash to the pavement
Which way is home? What did it all mean?
Don't stop saying what you feel
We can find a way out of here
I see different stars at noon too
I know they're my past and the people that came before
I know what you want to say is true
I hope the view is clear
I don't know if this can get funny
Every time you keep on achieving your dreams
I'm not the thing that you better be dreaming on
Let's find a way out of all of that
From the boundaries of our lives
You think you've got yourself inside of you
You're not young, you're not stupid
Hate and find love for you
You and I, that shit, did it just a minute
If you did it, just fucking admit it
Can I tell you, if you did it, just admit it
And we can all get together and be okay
